items.name: Ellis in Wonderland
items.descriptionZh: Herb Ellis 于 1956 年发行。

items.name: Electronic Earth
items.descriptionZh: Labrinth 于 2012 年发行。

items.name: DIVO
items.descriptionZh: François Michel Duguet 于 2003 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by François Michel Duguet in 2003.

01-01.birthdayZh: 1月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界把《Ellis in Wonderland》的爵士音符铺成晨曦，愿你像Herb Ellis那样，在生活的即兴里找到温柔的秩序。而《Electronic Earth》的电光从大地升起——你便是这新岁的第一道曙光，带着整个宇宙的初音与心跳，把旧日历翻成崭新的原野。你降生的日子，连时光都在重新谱写自己。
01-01.birthdayEn: January 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Herb Ellis’s “Ellis in Wonderland,” a jazz waltz of playful elegance, and Labrinth’s “Electronic Earth,” a bold new world of sound. Your life begins each year with this same spirit—of fresh creation and joyful discovery. May your path always hum with that first-day wonder, and may every step feel like a dawn chorus, bright and new. Happy birthday to a soul born at the very edge of possibility.

items.name: A Classical
items.descriptionZh: Ayumi Hamasaki 于 2013 年发行。

items.name: Signed and Sealed in Blood
items.descriptionZh: Dropkick Murphys 于 2013 年发行。

01-08.birthdayZh: 1月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《A Classical》的永恒旋律，像时光沉淀的温柔；也刻下《Signed and Sealed in Blood》的誓言，用热血封印约定。你来到世间，既是古典诗篇的韵脚，也是以真心签下契约的勇者。愿岁月配乐，你始终是旋律里最亮的那一弦。
01-08.birthdayEn: January 8 is your birthday. On this day, music history was carved in two beautiful, opposing keys: the elegant, soul-filling depth of Ayumi Hamasaki's "A Classical" and the raw, unbreakable heart of Dropkick Murphys' "Signed and Sealed in Blood." Your life carries both melodies—the quiet grace that soothes, and the bold, loyal beat that rises to every fight. May your new year be as timeless as classical harmony and as fiercely joyful as blood-deep bonds. Here's to you, a symphony of strength and tenderness, composing your own masterpiece.

items.name: Live on Ten Legs
items.descriptionZh: Pearl Jam 于 2011 年发行。

01-17.birthdayZh: 1月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为Pearl Jam的《Live on Ten Legs》而震颤——十个年头的巡演音符如根须扎进泥土，恰如你走过的每一步都让生命的舞台更坚固。愿你像那些鼓点般，在时光里踏出属于自己的节奏，用十倍的韧性活出二十倍的温柔。
01-17.birthdayEn: January 17 is your birthday. On this day, Pearl Jam unleashed "Live on Ten Legs," a collection of raw, roaring energy captured in the moment. Like that album’s spirit, may your new year be a live performance of your own design—unrehearsed, electric, and full of heart. Let the chords of joy ring out and the crowd of life cheer you on. Here’s to another trip around the sun, where every note you play is a celebration of the beautiful, unstoppable person you are.

items.name: All That Remains
items.descriptionZh: Fozzy 于 2005 年发行。

01-18.birthdayZh: 1月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾在《All That Remains》的旋律里留下倔强的回响——那些不曾被时间带走的热爱，终将成为你生命里最坚实的部分。像专辑里藏着的不熄灭的火，愿你永远记得：所有留下的，都值得被温柔守护。新的一岁，愿你所握住的，都是岁月替你筛过的光。
01-18.birthdayEn: January 18 is your birthday. On this day in history, Fozzy released "All That Remains"—a reminder that what endures is the fire within you. Like that album's spirit, may your year be filled with bold riffs and unshakable resilience. You are not just marking another year; you are carrying forward a melody of strength and light. May the days ahead hold quiet victories and loud laughter, and may you always feel surrounded by the warmth you so generously give to others. Happy birthday.

items.name: Illustrious
items.descriptionZh: Big Noyd 于 2008 年发行。

items.name: Gris-Gris
items.descriptionZh: Dr. John 于 1968 年发行。

items.name: 25 Years of Disco-Pop
items.descriptionZh: Modern Talking 于 2010 年发行。

01-22.birthdayZh: 1月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾在《Gris-Gris》的巫毒节奏里点燃灵魂的火焰，又在《Illustrious》的街头诗篇中淬炼出耀眼的勋章。你就像一部穿越时间的专辑——既有泥土里长出的韧劲，又有星光镀亮的温柔。生日快乐，愿每个音符都为你绽放力量。
01-22.birthdayEn: January 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gained your light, just as it once gained the soulful, swampy spirit of Dr. John’s Gris-Gris, a sound born from mystery and magic. Like that album, you carry a rare, earthy warmth that feels both timeless and deeply alive. May your year ahead unfold with the same vibrant, unexpected grace—wild and beautiful as the music that shares your day. You are a melody all your own, and today the whole world celebrates you.

items.name: Remapping the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: Epik High 于 2007 年发行。

items.name: Octopus
items.descriptionZh: The Human League 于 1995 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by The Human League in 1995.

01-23.birthdayZh: 1月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Remapping the Human Soul》与《Octopus》——一张重新描摹灵魂的疆域，一张于深海中拥抱生命的触角。愿你在自己的时区里，既有勇气重塑心底的风景，又懂得伸出温柔的触角，去感受一切辽阔与细微。你本身就是一首值得被聆听的歌。
01-23.birthdayEn: January 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Remapping the Human Soul" by Epik High and "Octopus" by The Human League—two albums that speak of reinvention and reaching into the deep. Like these works, may your year be a beautiful remapping of your own spirit, untangling new melodies from the quiet corners of your heart. May you feel as expansive as an ocean, grounded yet free, with every note of your existence playing toward the light. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Got to Be There
items.descriptionZh: Michael Jackson 于 1972 年发行。

01-24.birthdayZh: 1月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《Got to Be There》，像迈克尔·杰克逊说的“我必须在那里”——爱需要在场。愿你拥有“在那里”的勇气，陪伴自己走过每段路。生日是时间的标记，而你本身，就是“在那里”的光。
01-24.birthdayEn: January 24 is your birthday. On this day in 1972, the world first heard Michael Jackson’s “Got to Be There” — an album brimming with the tender hope of a young soul finding his place. Like that timeless record, may your year be filled with the grace of being truly present, the joy of a voice that knows it belongs. Let the spirit of that debut song guide you: you are needed, you are loved, and you have so much light to share. Happy birthday, beautifully here.

items.name: Chasing the Grail
items.descriptionZh: Fozzy 于 2010 年发行。

01-26.birthdayZh: 1月26日，是你的生日。愿你像《Chasing the Grail》那般，在岁月中追逐自己心中的圣杯，哪怕路途遥远，也不失勇气与光芒。每一个平凡的日子，都因你的坚持而闪着微光。愿你在追梦的路上，永远拥有热望与暖意。
01-26.birthdayEn: January 26 is your birthday, a day that carries the bold, adventurous spirit of albums like Fozzy’s *Chasing the Grail*. Just as that title suggests a quest for something precious, may your year ahead be a noble journey toward your own most meaningful treasures. Let this be your anthem of courage, a day to celebrate the unique path only you can walk. Here’s to new horizons, warm wishes, and the beautiful, ever-unfolding story of you.

items.name: Born to Die
items.descriptionZh: Lana Del Rey 于 2012 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Lana Del Rey in 2012.

01-27.birthdayZh: 1月27日，是你的生日。就像拉娜·德雷在冬日里唱出《Born to Die》，你生来不是为了凋零，而是带着向死而生的勇气。这一天，世界为你加冕，不必害怕开始或结束，你本身就是一首未写完的、温柔而暴烈的诗。
01-27.birthdayEn: January 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "Born to Die" by Lana Del Rey, a tapestry of vintage glamour and tender melancholy, reminding us that beauty can bloom from shadows. Like that album, your spirit carries a quiet, cinematic magic—a blend of resilience and grace. May your new year unfold like a song that grows richer with each listen, full of verses that surprise you with joy and a melody that feels like home. You are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: A Love Supreme
items.descriptionZh: John Coltrane 于 1965 年发行。

items.name: A New Flame
items.descriptionZh: Simply Red 于 1989 年发行。

items.name: Ambient 1: Music for Airports
items.descriptionZh: Brian Eno 于 1979 年发行。

02-01.birthdayZh: 2月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾飘出《A Love Supreme》的圣洁音符，那是献给宇宙最纯粹的爱；而《Ambient 1: Music for Airports》的静谧，又像时间为你铺开的温柔回响。你像这日子本身，既拥有深沉的力量，又自带宁静的港。愿你在新的一岁里，始终被至高之爱环绕，灵魂也拥有无垠的安详与辽阔。
02-01.birthdayEn: February 1 is your birthday. On this very date, the world was gifted with two masterpieces that echo your spirit: John Coltrane’s “A Love Supreme,” a soulful journey of devotion and grace, and Brian Eno’s “Ambient 1: Music for Airports,” which taught us to find peace in wide-open skies. Like these albums, you bring a rare harmony—deep, expansive, and full of light. May your year unfold with the quiet power of a jazz prayer, and the serene warmth of a sunrise that knows no limits. Happy birthday.

items.name: Airmax Muzik
items.descriptionZh: Fler 于 2007 年发行。

items.name: Best of Soul
items.descriptionZh: BoA 于 2005 年发行。

items.name: Killers
items.descriptionZh: Iron Maiden 于 1981 年发行。

02-02.birthdayZh: 2月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Killers》注入不屈的锋芒，也为《Best of Soul》收藏了灵魂的温柔歌谣。你像铁血战车般勇敢前行，也像旋律一样让四季柔软。当岁月穿过你，请记得——你既是破开黑夜的力量，也是照亮自己的光。
02-02.birthdayEn: February 2 is your birthday, a date that shines with legends. On this day, the spirit of Iron Maiden’s “Killers” was unleashed—bold, fierce, and unapologetic. Yet also, BoA’s “Best of Soul” reminds us that strength and grace can live together in one heart. May your new year carry that fire to rise, that soul to feel deeply, and the quiet joy of knowing you are a masterpiece in progress. Here’s to you—rooted in history, yet writing your own timeless melody.

items.name: Nocturama
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds 于 2003 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds in 2003.

items.name: I-Magination
items.descriptionZh: Masami Okui 于 2010 年发行。

02-03.birthdayZh: 2月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾悄悄为你存下两份礼物。Nick Cave在《Nocturama》里埋下夜的暗语——所有暗处终将托起黎明，就像你穿越的每个寒冬，都成了脊骨里的火种。而Masami Okui的《I-Magination》正为你打开想象之门：你值得拥有比现实更辽阔的星图。看啊，连历史都学着用你的方式，把黑暗谱成前奏，让梦长出翅膀。
02-03.birthdayEn: February 3 is your birthday. On this same day, the world was gifted the haunting, resilient spirit of Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds’ Nocturama, a reminder that even in shadow, beauty surges. And Masami Okui’s I-Magination arrived like a spark, urging dreams to take flight. So as you step into this new year, carry that fierce, midnight courage and the boundless hope of imagination. May your day be wrapped in the warmth of creation, and your heart know that every beginning holds a quiet, enduring song.

items.name: Control
items.descriptionZh: Janet Jackson 于 1986 年发行。

items.name: Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy
items.descriptionZh: Thin Lizzy 于 1991 年发行。

02-04.birthdayZh: 2月4日，是你的生日。这一天生来带着双重的礼物：Janet Jackson在《Control》里试着松开世界的线，把方向盘握回自己手中；而Thin Lizzy用《Dedication》告诉你，最深的爱是日复一日的选择。所以，愿你既有掌控自己的勇气，也有向所爱之物全然忠诚的温柔。光从这里开始，路在你脚下。
02-04.birthdayEn: February 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Control"—Janet Jackson’s bold anthem of self-empowerment and fierce grace. And years later, Thin Lizzy’s "Dedication: The Very Best of" arrived, a tribute to resilience and the poetry of rock. Like these albums, your life is a melody of strength and heart. May your new year ring with the courage to shape your own rhythm and the joy of being celebrated. You are both the artist and the song—unfolding, brilliant, and deeply loved.

items.name: No Regrets
items.descriptionZh: Faye Wong 于 1993 年发行。

items.name: Alive
items.descriptionZh: Meshuggah 于 2010 年发行。

items.name: The Afterman: Descension
items.descriptionZh: Coheed and Cambria 于 2013 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Coheed and Cambria in 2013.

02-05.birthdayZh: 2月5日，是你的生日。这一天，有歌者在寒夜中唱出《No Regrets》，像一束不灭的烛火，告诉你每道抉择都值得敬意。还有金属脉搏撞破冰层，仿佛《Alive》的鼓点带着大地的心跳——活着本身就是最倔强的庆典。世界曾把这么多不肯妥协的声音放进这一天，而你恰好接过了这把火。愿你在自己的节拍里，永远做个无需后悔的发光体。
02-05.birthdayEn: February 5 is your birthday. It’s a day that dawns with the spirit of “No Regrets,” inviting you to move forward without looking back, embracing every step as part of your own unique melody. Like the fearless journey in “The Afterman: Descension,” may your year ahead be a story of discovery—each challenge a verse, each joy a chorus. Let the music of your life ring true, alive with hope and the promise of new beginnings. Here’s to you, and to the beautiful song only you can sing.

items.descriptionZh: Ladytron 于 2001 年发行。

items.name: ...Where the Shadows Lie
items.descriptionZh: Battlelore 于 2002 年发行。

02-06.birthdayZh: 2月6日，是你的生日。这一天生来带着光和力量，就像《604》在电子节拍里闪烁着未来与温柔，而《...Where the Shadows Lie》教我们拥抱阴影，才能更亮地站起。愿你在属于自己的旋律里，从不孤单，慢慢成为那个无论晴雨都能给自己点灯的人。
02-06.birthdayEn: February 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us two albums that carry different fires. Ladytron’s “604” spins with cool, shimmering energy—a reminder that you bring both depth and light. Battlelore’s “...Where the Shadows Lie” sings of epic journeys, of strength born from the quiet places within. May your year ahead hold the thrill of new beginnings and the power of your own resilient spirit. Celebrate the beautiful, complex melody that is you.

items.name: Thug Brothers
items.descriptionZh: Layzie Bone 于 2006 年发行。

items.name: A Different Kind of Truth
items.descriptionZh: Van Halen 于 2012 年发行。

02-07.birthdayZh: 2月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《A Different Kind of Truth》——它像一道不驯的光，提醒你真实的棱角自有锋芒；也响起过《Thug Brothers》的鼓点，诉说着逆境中并肩的力量。愿新的一岁，你既敢活成另一种真相，也永远被温柔的羁绊托举，在属于自己的节奏里，大步流星地走向春天。
02-07.birthdayEn: February 7 is your birthday. Like "A Different Kind of Truth," may this year bring a bold new rhythm to your days, a fresh harmony that surprises and delights you. And like the brotherhood in "Thug Brothers," may you feel surrounded by loyal love and unshakable support through every verse of your journey. Your life is a rare album, composed of light and resilience. May this spin around the sun be your most beautiful track yet—full of joy, grace, and the music of a heart fully alive.

items.name: Kingdom of Madness
items.descriptionZh: Edguy 于 1997 年发行。

02-08.birthdayZh: 2月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《Kingdom of Madness》的序曲，如同你生命里那股不驯的火光——在清醒与疯狂之间，照见独一无二的勇气。愿你像专辑精神一样，把内心每一寸狂想都长成坚实的王国。风暴终会平息，而你自己的歌，永远铿锵。
02-08.birthdayEn: February 8 is your birthday. On this day, Edguy’s “Kingdom of Madness” roared into the world, a testament to the wild, beautiful chaos that can birth greatness. May your new year carry that fiery spirit—bold, unapologetic, and full of electric dreams. Like the album’s anthemic heart, may your path be a kingdom where every challenge becomes a song of strength. Let the madness of joy and the sweetness of life’s melodies guide you. You are a masterpiece in the making, and the world is lucky to witness your story unfold.

items.name: Lonesome Crow
items.descriptionZh: Scorpions 于 1972 年发行。

items.name: Live!! Final Attack at Budokan
items.descriptionZh: Sex Machineguns 于 2003 年发行。

02-09.birthdayZh: 2月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Lonesome Crow》的孤独轰鸣，那是蝎子乐队在荒原上点燃的第一簇火——孤独也可以长出翅膀。而《Live!! Final Attack at Budokan》像一场永不落幕的决战，告诉你要用燃烧的节奏击碎沉寂。你降生时，那些音符便埋进你的骨血：从此每一岁，都是孤勇之上开出的花，是终将抵达的雷鸣掌声。
02-09.birthdayEn: February 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw edge of Scorpions’ Lonesome Crow and the electric fire of Sex Machineguns’ Live!! Final Attack at Budokan. Like those albums, your spirit carries a blend of wild rhythm and soaring freedom. May your new year echo with the courage to start a riff, the joy of a full-stage roar, and the warmth of a crowd that cheers your name. Here’s to you—a living, breathing anthem of light and strength.

items.name: Identity
items.descriptionZh: BoA 于 2010 年发行。

items.name: Tapestry
items.descriptionZh: Carole King 于 1971 年发行。

items.name: The Art in Heaven Concert
items.descriptionZh: Mike Oldfield 于 2000 年发行。

02-10.birthdayZh: 2月10日，是你的生日。这一天的音符里，藏着许多温柔的力量。Carole King的《Tapestry》像一张用时间织就的毯子，每一缕丝线都是你走过的晴雨与冷暖。而BoA的《Identity》提醒你，不必成为别人故事里的角色。你早已是自己完整的主调。在这特别的日子，愿你拥抱自己细腻的纹理，也骄傲地唱出独属于你的旋律。
02-10.birthdayEn: February 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the intimate storytelling of Carole King's "Tapestry," weaving threads of resilience and gentle truth, and the soaring, cosmic artistry of Mike Oldfield's "The Art in Heaven Concert." May your year ahead be a beautiful composition of these spirits—a tapestry of quiet strength and bright, fearless joy. Just as those melodies found their moment, may you feel the harmony of your own light, celebrated and cherished. Happy birthday.

items.name: DepArture
items.descriptionZh: AAA 于 2009 年发行。

02-11.birthdayZh: 2月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过一张叫《DepArture》的专辑，像你一样，带着启程的决心来到人间。每一次出发都藏着勇气，而你的存在就是那束温柔的光——照亮自己，也温暖途经的风景。愿你在新的一岁里，始终带着启航的从容，被岁月深深拥抱。
02-11.birthdayEn: February 11 is your birthday. On this day, the album "DepArture" by AAA took flight, a celebration of new horizons and the courage to leave the familiar behind. May your year ahead be filled with that same spirit of adventure and boundless hope. Like a departure toward a brighter sky, may you step into the light of all you are becoming. Here is to the journey, the music, and the beautiful beginning that is you. Happy birthday.

items.name: See You in the Next Life
items.descriptionZh: Suede 于 2004 年发行。

items.name: Temper Temper
items.descriptionZh: Bullet for My Valentine 于 2013 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Bullet for My Valentine in 2013.

02-12.birthdayZh: 2月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用两种声音为你铺垫生命的底色——Suede在《See You in the Next Life》里低语告别，却把重逢的勇气种进时间缝隙；Bullet for My Valentine用《Temper Temper》的炽烈，教人把锋芒炼成光。你不必匆忙赶路，每一次转身都有旧旋律在身后铺成温柔的路标。生日本就是自己的恒星，光热自足，昼夜不息。
02-12.birthdayEn: February 12 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with two bold, beautiful albums: Suede’s “See You in the Next Life” and Bullet for My Valentine’s “Temper Temper.” Like Suede’s dreamy farewell, may your year hold the courage to let go of what no longer serves you. And like the fierce heart of “Temper Temper,” may you find a fire within that refuses to dim. You are a melody of resilience and grace—may this next trip around the sun be your most harmonious yet. Happy birthday.

items.name: All Eyez on Me
items.descriptionZh: Tupac Shakur 于 1996 年发行。

items.name: Black Swan Songs
items.descriptionZh: Epik High 于 2006 年发行。

items.name: Black Sabbath
items.descriptionZh: Black Sabbath 于 1970 年发行。

02-13.birthdayZh: 2月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾推出《Black Sabbath》的黑暗与力量，也在《All Eyez on Me》里拥抱坦荡的目光——它们像两面镜子，照见你生命中既有的沉静锋芒，也有被注视的勇气。愿你在新的一岁里，像那些旋律一样，既敢于黑得厚重，也亮得透明。生日本身，就是最勇敢的开篇。
02-13.birthdayEn: February 13 is your birthday. On this day, music history gifted us legendary albums, and their spirit dances in your own story. The raw power of Black Sabbath’s self-titled debut, a storm of thunder and invention, mirrors the strength you carry. And the bold, unflinching poetry of Tupac’s All Eyez on Me echoes your own fearless heart. Like those masterpieces, your life is a unique composition of depth and light. May this new year find you wrapped in love, walking your path with the confidence of a song that knows its own worth. Celebrate your beautiful sound.

items.name: Whitney Houston
items.descriptionZh: Whitney Houston 于 1985 年发行。

items.name: Cooleyhighharmony
items.descriptionZh: Boyz II Men 于 1991 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by Boyz II Men in 1991.

items.name: Evernight

02-18.birthdayEn: February 18 is your birthday. May your year dance between that fierce liberation and quiet resilience. Like these songs, may you always find your own rhythm—unexpected, beautiful, and perfectly yours. Happy birthday to a soul who shares a date with such beautiful, brave music.

02-21.birthdayEn: February 21 is your birthday. On this day, the soulful echoes of Tarot by Dark Moor were released, a reminder that your life is a rich, unfolding story of power and mystery. Like that album’s spirit, may your year be filled with epic journeys and secret strengths you’ve yet to discover. You are the artist of your own fate, writing each page with courage and light. May your path be bright, your heart full, and your song always rising. Happy birthday.

May your year ahead feel as radiant as a beloved song, unfolding with grace and a little joyful rhythm. You are a melody all your own, and today the world turns up the volume just for you. Happy birthday.

You are a melody that grows richer with every passing note—here’s to the song you’re still writing.

02-26.birthdayEn: February 26 is your birthday. May your year ahead hold both light and depth, joy and meaning, all woven together into a melody only you can sing. You are a masterpiece in motion.

Happy birthday, with love.

02-29.birthdayEn: February 29 is your birthday, a rare and magical date that arrives like a secret gift meant only for the boldest hearts. May this leap year bring you a year of beautiful pauses, unexpected harmonies, and the joyful freedom to rewrite time itself. You are a beautiful rarity, and the world is brighter for the day you chose to arrive.

Happy birthday, with all the warmth and harmony you deserve.

03-02.birthdayEn: March 2 is your birthday. Like Tupac’s “Until the End of Time,” may your spirit of resilience and truth echo far beyond any horizon. Keep shining, keep dreaming—your story is a melody still unfolding, and it’s one for the ages.

Like the fearless reinvention of Lady Gaga’s The Remix, may your year ahead be a joyful reimagining of everything you already are. And like Jethro Tull’s Thick as a Brick, may your days hold depth and texture, a layered journey of quiet strength and wild dreams. You are a masterpiece composed of all these melodies. Today, and always, may you feel celebrated, cherished, and endlessly loved.

03-04.birthdayEn: March 4 is your birthday. On this day in 1957, Miles Davis released 'Round About Midnight, an album that taught us to find beauty in the stillness between notes. Like that music, your presence brings a quiet, soulful warmth that makes the world feel a little more whole. May your year unfold with the same grace—each moment a note held just long enough to matter, each challenge a shade of blue that deepens into joy. Happy birthday to a soul in perfect harmony with its own brilliant, honest rhythm.

Like those albums, your presence weaves energy and grace into every room. May your year ahead hum with the same spirit—dancing through challenges, wrapped in harmony, and feeling the timeless rhythm of love that only grows deeper with time. Celebrate the beautiful melody that is you.

items.name: Mainstream Overtures

03-06.birthdayZh: 3月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了《Medusa》的勇敢——美杜莎的目光不是石化，而是凝视内心后蜕变的盔甲；也洒下《Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time》的洒脱，即便被命运暂时遗忘，也假设自己正在尽兴。愿你在自己的时区里，既有破茧的锋芒，亦有坦荡的欢愉。这日子因你而圆满。
03-06.birthdayEn: March 6 is your birthday, a date that celebrates not only you but also the spirit of bold creation. On this day, Annie Lennox unleashed “Medusa,” a masterpiece of raw strength and transformation, and Mark Knopfler gave us “Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time,” an invitation to wander and wonder. May your year ahead be like these albums—alive with courage, rich with discovery, and full of moments that make you feel truly found. Happy birthday to someone who adds their own beautiful note to the world’s song.

items.name: The Vintage Virgin
items.descriptionZh: Sebastian Karlsson 于 2007 年发行。

items.name: Elena Yerevan - My Guitar
items.descriptionZh: Elena Nikoghosyan 于 2017 年发行。

03-07.birthdayZh: 3月7日，是你的生日。这天诞生的《The Vintage Virgin》像你初来世界时的纯净与勇气，而《My Guitar》是你生命里那把从不沉默的琴弦。你每一年都在学着弹奏自己——无论晴天或阴雨，那些音符都带着根。愿你的日子像老唱片般温暖醇厚，也像新弦一样，每拨动一次，就生出新的光。
03-07.birthdayEn: March 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us two gifts of song: Sebastian Karlsson’s “The Vintage Virgin,” a bold, timeless spirit of renewal, and Elena Nikoghosyan’s “Elena Yerevan - My Guitar,” a gentle melody strummed from the heart. Like these albums, you carry both the courage to begin again and the soft rhythm of love. May your year be a beautiful composition—bold where it needs to be, tender where it matters, and always, always in perfect harmony. Happy birthday.

items.name: Kansas
items.descriptionZh: Kansas 于 1974 年发行。

items.name: The Beach Boys Today!
items.descriptionZh: The Beach Boys 于 1965 年发行。
items.descriptionEn: Released by The Beach Boys in 1965.

03-08.birthdayZh: 3月8日，是你的生日。这一天， Kansas乐队的同名专辑诞生，像平原上的风，倔强又辽阔，提醒你生命可以自由生长。而The Beach Boys的《The Beach Boys Today!》则唱出阳光与海浪，像在说：此刻就是最好的时光。愿你的岁月如这些旋律，既有大地的力量，也有晴空的明亮。生日快乐，继续发光。
03-08.birthdayEn: March 8 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “Kansas” by Kansas, an album that found its skyward anthem in the dust of the plains, and “The Beach Boys Today!”—a joyful, sunlit promise that the best is yet to come. Like those records, may your new year carry both the grounding earth and the open road, the warmth of old harmonies and the thrill of a fresh verse. You are a melody worth celebrating. Here’s to you.

items.name: Are You Gonna Go My Way
items.descriptionZh: Lenny Kravitz 于 1993 年发行。

items.name: Epilogue

03-09.birthdayZh: 3月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好三份礼物：Lenny Kravitz在《Are You Gonna Go My Way》里唱出破茧的勇气，Angela Aki在《One》中写下独一无二的星光。你像Epilogue的尾声般温柔，却又拥有启程的锋芒。每一年今日，地球都替你珍藏这些音符——它们等在你生命的拐角，陪你走向更亮的地方。
03-09.birthdayEn: March 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted with the soulful fire of Lenny Kravitz’s *Are You Gonna Go My Way*, a call to move forward with courage and rhythm. Like the hopeful turns of Angela Aki’s *One*, your life is a melody of resilience and grace. May your year ahead sing with bold steps and gentle harmonies, each note a reminder of the light you bring. Here’s to you—a masterpiece in progress, born on a day of music and meaning.

items.name: Contact from the Underworld of Redboy
items.descriptionZh: Robbie Robertson 于 1998 年发行。

items.name: First Love
items.descriptionZh: Hikaru Utada 于 1999 年发行。

03-10.birthdayZh: 3月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好两束光。一束来自《First Love》，是纯白而明亮的开始——像你第一次睁开眼睛时那样，一切刚刚苏醒，充满可能。另一束来自《Contact from the Underworld of Redboy》，那是地底传来的鼓声，提醒你：所有走过的黑暗与曲折，都未曾使你的光芒熄灭。你生在这一天，生来就懂得爱，也生来就带着力量。
03-10.birthdayEn: March 10 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with the bold spirit of "Contact from the Underworld of Redboy" and the tender, soul-stirring grace of "First Love." Like Robbie Robertson’s swirling journey through new worlds, may your year be full of brave discoveries. And like Utada’s timeless debut, may your heart always remember its first, purest passions. You are a melody of both strength and softness. Here’s to another beautiful verse in your story.

03-11.birthdayZh: 3月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾听见《The Joshua Tree》的苍茫回响，把荒芜走成绿洲的勇气刻进风里；也曾飘过《The College Dropout》的反叛与赤诚，告诉每一个平凡的人：你本可以破茧成蝶。愿你在岁月的土壤里，把自己活成一场不必回头的春天。
03-11.birthdayEn: March 11 is your birthday, and the world celebrated alongside you in its own quiet way. On this day, the hopeful pulse of the Beatles' Please Please Me first stirred the air, a burst of youthful energy and promise. Years later, the raw, soul-deep journey of Bob Dylan’s Blood on the Tracks reminded us that even heartbreak can hold a fierce beauty. May your year carry that same spirit: the bright spark of new beginnings and the resilient wisdom of a well-lived song. Happy birthday to you.

items.name: Warmi
items.descriptionZh: Magaly Solier 于 2009 年发行。

items.name: Fugazi
items.descriptionZh: Marillion 于 1984 年发行。

03-12.birthdayZh: 3月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Warmi》，像暖风拂过安第斯山巅，提醒你柔软并非脆弱；也曾奏响《Fugazi》，在混乱中倔强生长，像你内心始终不灭的火焰。生日不过是地球又一次回到初见你的位置。愿你像这天收录的音乐一样，在温柔里扎根，在自由里奔跑。
03-12.birthdayEn: March 12 is your birthday, the same day the world received "Fugazi" by Marillion—a bold, free-spirited album that defied convention—and "Warmi" by Magaly Solier, a soulful tribute to inner strength and tenderness. Like those releases, you carry a blend of fierce independence and gentle warmth. May your year ahead echo their spirit: unapologetically bold, deeply rooted, and radiant with quiet grace. Here’s to you—a living, breathing melody of courage and beauty. Happy birthday.

items.name: Amor prohibido
items.descriptionZh: Selena 于 1994 年发行。

03-13.birthdayZh: 3月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《Amor prohibido》——那被禁止的爱，其实是最无畏的勇气。就像Selena唱的那样，爱从不该被定义，你的存在本身就是一首自由的歌。愿你在新的一岁里，如春日破土，温柔而坚定地盛放。
03-13.birthdayEn: March 13 is your birthday. On this day, Selena gifted the world "Amor prohibido," an album that pulses with forbidden passion and defiant love. Just as that music dared to break boundaries, may your year ahead be filled with bold, beautiful risks—the kind that make your heart sing. You are a melody of resilience and grace, and as the world celebrates this date in history, the truest song is the life you're composing. Happy birthday to a soul who turns every day into a chorus of courage.

items.name: Me Against the World
items.descriptionZh: Tupac Shakur 于 1995 年发行。

items.name: Dante XXI
items.descriptionZh: Sepultura 于 2006 年发行。

03-14.birthdayZh: 3月14日，是你的生日。这一天，《Me Against the World》曾唱出对抗命运的孤勇，而《Dante XXI》则穿越炼狱寻找星光。你降生的日子，连音符都在诉说：世界或许有风雨，但你体内住着不屈的焰火。愿你在自己的时区里，始终保有“全世界与我为敌也无妨”的底气，以及穿越黑暗后，拥抱光的温柔。
03-14.birthdayEn: March 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us “Me Against the World,” a testament to rising with grace through struggle, and “Dante XXI,” a journey through shadow into light. May your year carry that resilient spirit—turning every challenge into a stepping stone, every note into a song of your own making. You are not against the world; you are a melody the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal
items.descriptionZh: Younha 于 2007 年发行。

items.name: And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004
items.descriptionZh: HIM 于 2004 年发行。

03-15.birthdayZh: 3月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Younha唱起《Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal》，像一个最适合告白的日子，你来到这世界本身就是一场勇敢的坦白；而HIM的《And Love Said No》却教会你，爱也可以拒绝、退场，然后重生。你有勇气开口，也有底气转身——生日这天，世界把温柔和坚毅都写进了你的年轮。
03-15.birthdayEn: March 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Younha's “Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal,” a whisper of confession and fresh starts, and HIM's “And Love Said No,” a velvet storm of heartbreak turned into strength. May your year carry that same balance—the courage to speak your truth like a quiet dawn, and the resilience to rise from any no with a defiant, romantic grace. You are a melody written in both light and shadow, and today, the universe celebrates every note.

items.name: Bertemu
items.descriptionZh: Megumi Hayashibara 于 2005 年发行。

03-16.birthdayZh: 3月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你存下一首叫《Bertemu》的歌，它的名字在印尼语里是“相遇”——像星与夜的约定，所有的美好都在这一天找到你。你来到人间，不是偶然，而是宇宙早已谱好的旋律。愿你的每一步都踏在光里，像专辑封面上那场盛大的重逢——与爱、与勇气、与更辽阔的自己。
03-16.birthdayEn: March 16 is your birthday, a day that holds a special melody in the world. On this date in 2005, Megumi Hayashibara released "Bertemu," which in spirit means "to meet." How fitting for your entry into the world—a beautiful meeting of hopes, dreams, and all the hearts you've touched since. May your new year feel like that album’s title: a joyful reunion with all that makes you shine, a gentle harmony of beginnings and gratitude. You are a song the world is lucky to have met. Happy birthday.

03-17.birthdayZh: 3月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾因音乐而柔软——k.d. lang的《Ingénue》像初春的细雨，唱出天真而坚韧的灵魂；Mike Oldfield的《Music of the Spheres》将宇宙的韵律揉进音符，提醒你生命的节奏可以辽阔如星河。愿你如专辑之名，保有赤诚的纯真，也拥有属于自己的天体乐章。生日快乐，这世界因你的存在而多了一首好歌。
03-17.birthdayEn: March 17 is your birthday. It’s a day of beautiful arrivals, a date that once gave us the luminous, heartfelt spirit of k.d. lang’s Ingénue, a reminder to embrace our tender, true selves. Like the music of that album, may your year be filled with honest emotion and quiet grace. On this day of your own unique release into the world, may you feel entirely seen, celebrated, and deeply loved. Here’s to you—melody, soul, and all.

03-18.birthdayZh: 3月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用《Victory》的旋律标记——每一次出发，都藏着凯旋的伏笔；也别忘了《J to tha L–O! The Remixes》的节奏，像生命中那些被反复打磨的片段，最终都成了独属于你的节拍。你往前走，身后已是星光铺就的路。
03-18.birthdayEn: March 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Victory" by Modern Talking, a reminder that triumph lives in the rhythm of your own heartbeat, and "J to tha L–O! The Remixes" by Jennifer Lopez, a celebration of reinvention and radiant confidence. So today, may you feel that same unstoppable energy—like a dance floor under a golden sky. Let your spirit hum with the sweetness of new beginnings, and know that every year you add another verse to a song only you can sing. Shine on.

items.name: Grow into One
items.descriptionZh: Kumi Koda 于 2003 年发行。

items.name: Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: Bob Dylan 于 1962 年发行。

items.name: No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls
items.descriptionZh: Simple Plan 于 2002 年发行。

03-19.birthdayZh: 3月19日，是你的生日。像《Bob Dylan》的第一声吉他，你带着初生般的诚实与好奇踏入世界；又像《Grow into One》里那种缓慢而坚定的成长，每一年都在将自己拼得更完整。愿你在自己的节拍里，长出温柔又倔强的根须，像春天一样，从不辜负每一寸光照。
03-19.birthdayEn: March 19 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us with iconic albums. Like Bob Dylan’s self-titled debut, your story began with a bold, honest first note, promising a journey of depth and change. And like Simple Plan’s *No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls*, you bring a fearless, joyful energy that reminds us to leap without hesitation. May your year be a beautiful harmony—woven from brave beginnings and unapologetic fun. Happy birthday to you, the soundtrack of our hearts.

items.descriptionZh: Prince 于 2006 年发行。

03-20.birthdayZh: 3月20日，是你的生日。这一天，Prince让《3121》的旋律随风启程，它像一座隐秘的花园，藏着不设限的自由与锋芒。你生来如此——在属于自己的节拍里，温柔而笃定地生长。愿新的一年，你依然怀抱那份独特的节拍，让每一个平凡日子，都回响着忠于内心的声音。
03-20.birthdayEn: March 20 is your birthday. On this day in 2006, Prince released "3121," an album pulsing with liberation and joy. May your new year carry that same fearless spirit—a rhythm that dares you to dance through every moment, a melody that reminds you of your own brilliance. Like the album’s vibrant heart, may your days be full of color and unexpected grace. You are a celebration in motion. Happy birthday, beautiful soul. May the world around you reflect the light you bring to it.

items.descriptionZh: Lisa Stansfield 于 1997 年发行。

items.name: Am Wasser gebaut

03-21.birthdayZh: 3月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好三份礼物：Rubycon如深红琥珀，封存着时间深处的静谧与勇气；Am Wasser gebaut像临水而立的屋，教你在流动的岁月里筑起自己的岸。你生在这春分日，光与夜刚刚好平衡——愿你如专辑般，既有沉淀的宝石之心，又有随波却不逐流的温柔底气。
03-21.birthdayEn: March 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Tangerine Dream’s “Rubycon,” a shimmering, cosmic journey born from the same spring equinox that brings you into the light. Like Fettes Brot’s “Am Wasser gebaut,” your life is built by the water—flowing, resilient, and full of quiet strength. May your year ahead be as layered and luminous as these albums: deep currents of joy, and a melody that only you can sing. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: A Tribute to Miles
items.descriptionZh: Herbie Hancock 于 1994 年发行。

items.name: A Real Live One
items.descriptionZh: Iron Maiden 于 1993 年发行。

03-22.birthdayZh: 3月22日，是你的生日。这一天，Herbie Hancock用《A Tribute to Miles》致敬不朽的爵士精神，提醒你生命中的每一次合奏都值得被铭记；而Iron Maiden的《A Real Live One》则唱响热烈的真实，让你在属于自己的时刻，勇敢活成一场沸腾的现场。愿你的新一岁，既有致敬过去的温柔，也有拥抱当下的力量。
03-22.birthdayEn: March 22 is your birthday, a date that carries the echoes of legendary anthems. On this day, the world was gifted both the soulful improvisation of Herbie Hancock's "A Tribute to Miles" and the fierce, live energy of Iron Maiden's "A Real Live One." May your year ahead dance with the same brilliant harmony and fearless spirit—a beautiful blend of quiet reflection and roaring adventure. Happy birthday to you, a living tribute to all the strength and grace you carry.

items.name: …And Then There Were Three…

03-23.birthdayZh: 3月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《MDNA》——Madonna的坚韧与重塑，告诉你每一次心跳都是新的起点；而《…And Then There Were Three…》里，Genesis在离散中找到简洁的完整。你就像这日子本身，带着断裂后的缝合，在歌声中长出属于自己的羽翼。生日快乐，愿你始终拥有出发的勇气。
03-23.birthdayEn: March 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of Madonna’s “MDNA,” a pulse of fearless reinvention, and Genesis’ “And Then There Were Three…,” a quiet triumph of resilience and unity. Let these albums remind you that your own story is a masterpiece—each year a new track, every challenge a bridge to a stronger chorus. May your path ahead glow with bold rhythm and gentle harmony. Here’s to you, the beautiful song only you can sing.

items.name: One Heart
items.descriptionZh: Céline Dion 于 2003 年发行。

items.name: 26 Mixes for Cash
items.descriptionZh: Aphex Twin 于 2003 年发行。

03-24.birthdayZh: 3月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了两份礼物：一张叫《One Heart》，提醒你，一颗完整的心足以穿越所有季节的荒凉；一张叫《26 Mixes for Cash》，那些反复编排的旋律，像生活里每一次呼吸与重塑，都值得被温柔对待。所以请记得，你是被时间和音乐共同选中的人，在属于你的日子，万物都在轻声祝你生日快乐。
03-24.birthdayEn: March 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted with music—Céline Dion’s “One Heart” reminds us that your presence carries a quiet, radiant love, while Aphex Twin’s “26 Mixes for Cash” whispers that life is a beautiful, unpredictable remix. Like those albums, you blend tenderness with unexpected depth, a melody of grace and resilience. May this year unfold as your most harmonious song yet, filled with moments that echo joy and peace. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the world is richer for your tune.

items.name: One Day in Your Life
items.descriptionZh: Michael Jackson 于 1981 年发行。

items.name: Life After Death

items.descriptionEn: Released by The Notorious B.I.G. in 1997.

items.name: Femme Fatale

03-25.birthdayZh: 3月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐向你致意——Michael Jackson唱起《One Day in Your Life》，像在说，你来的每一天都值得被温柔珍藏。而Britney Spears的《Femme Fatale》提醒你，柔弱是铠甲，坚韧才是本质。愿你的生命，既有被爱的底气，又有主宰自己的锋芒。
03-25.birthdayEn: March 25 is your birthday—a date that gifted the world with music as layered and luminous as you are. Like Michael Jackson’s "One Day in Your Life," may this year hold moments that feel both tender and timeless, each note a quiet celebration of your journey. And like the fierce, enduring spirit of "Femme Fatale," may you walk forward with unshakable confidence, knowing you are both the melody and the power behind it. Here’s to another orbit around the sun—bright, bold, and beautifully yours.

items.name: Trilogy: Past Present Future

03-26.birthdayZh: 3月26日，是你的生日。这一天，Frank Sinatra把《Trilogy: Past Present Future》献给了时光——它提醒你，过去是序章，此刻是礼物，未来是勇气。而《Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver》如月光般柔韧，映照你一路走来的坚持与蜕变。愿你在新的一岁里，既有回望的温柔，也有前行的星光。
03-26.birthdayEn: March 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and in years past, it welcomed albums like Frank Sinatra's "Trilogy: Past Present Future," a poignant reminder that your life, too, is a beautiful trilogy of all you've been, all you are, and all you'll become. As you step into this new year, may its spirit of timeless grace and enduring hope carry you forward, like the gentle, uplifting melodies of "Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver" — a soundtrack of shimmering possibilities. Celebrate the masterpiece only you can compose.

items.name: Map the Soul
items.descriptionZh: Epik High 于 2009 年发行。

items.name: Back to Life
items.descriptionZh: Sandra 于 2009 年发行。

items.name: Love at First Sting
items.descriptionZh: Scorpions 于 1984 年发行。

03-27.birthdayZh: 3月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了音乐的礼物。Epik High的《Map the Soul》提醒你，内心的地图从未迷路，每一步都在绘制独特的风景。而Scorpions的《Love at First Sting》告诉你，爱可以如初见般炽烈。愿你在新的一岁，像这些旋律一样，既有探索灵魂的勇气，也有被爱击中的柔软力量。
03-27.birthdayEn: March 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, searching soul of Epik High’s “Map the Soul,” a reminder to chart your own inner landscape with courage. It also unleashed the electrifying love of Scorpions’ “Love at First Sting,” a testament to passion that stings and heals. Like those albums, your life is a fearless journey and a fierce, beautiful anthem. May your year ahead be as vibrant as a power ballad and as deep as a lyric that finds its way home.

03-28.birthdayZh: 3月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《The Dark Side of the Moon》敞开过黑暗的裂隙，那是生命在阴影里寻找光明的勇气。愿你像这张专辑一样，在时间的潮汐中接住自己的脆弱与灿烂。生日不只是年岁的递增，而是你与宇宙共鸣的私密旋律。今天，所有的星辉都为你列队，带着平和与坚毅，继续走向属于你的旷野。
03-28.birthdayEn: March 28 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world was gifted the raw energy of "Appetite for Destruction" and the soulful rebirth of "The Joshua Tree." Like those albums, may your year ahead hold both wild, unapologetic passion and the quiet, sacred grace of new perspectives. You are a song of resilience and wonder, written in the key of your own becoming. So blow out the candles, dear heart, and let the symphony of your life play on with even more light, more love, and more beautiful noise.

03-29.birthdayZh: 3月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾种下一颗《Seed》，在音乐里悄然发芽——就像你生命里那些看似微小的坚持，终将长成自己的森林。而当你感到世界太吵，不妨记起《Rolling Papers》：那些卷起的纸页不是束缚，是记录你故事的诗集。生日只是时间的注脚，你才是光本身。
03-29.birthdayEn: March 29 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with the raw, rising energy of Wiz Khalifa’s Rolling Papers—a reminder that every chapter begins with a spark, and you’re writing a masterpiece with each passing year. Like the timeless pulse of Daft Punk’s Musique Vol. 1, your life grooves through eras, each beat a memory, each pause a breath. May your year ahead be as bold and radiant as the music that marks this date—full of rhythm, growth, and the gentle joy of being exactly where you are.

items.name: Soulicious
items.descriptionZh: Sarah Connor 于 2007 年发行。

03-30.birthdayZh: 3月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾因Sarah Connor的《Souliccious》而多了一份灵魂的质地，像一颗包裹着柔软果核的种子，盼着在春天的深处破土。愿你的岁月也这般：既有穿透暗夜的低吟，又有托住日出的笃定。生日快乐，愿你始终被自己珍爱，像音符落进它该去的和弦里。
03-30.birthdayEn: March 30 is your birthday, a date touched by a special harmony. On this day, the soulful spirit of “Soulicious” by Sarah Connor was born into the world—an album brimming with warmth, depth, and the resilience of the heart. Just as those songs celebrate the rhythm of feeling, may your year ahead pulse with joy, courage, and the sweet, uplifting melody of life’s most beautiful moments. You are a living song, and the world is lucky to hear you. Happy birthday.

03-31.birthdayZh: 3月31日，是你的生日。这一天，《Universe》在音符里铺开整片星空，提醒你世界始终辽阔，值得你轻轻着陆；而《I'm Not Dead》像一声骄傲的宣告，将勇气唱进骨血。穿过光阴的轨辙，你依然在生长，像三月的枝头，正把春天一寸一寸捧出绿意。
03-31.birthdayEn: March 31 is your birthday, a date that echoes with creative fire. On this day, the resistance and raw truth of Pink’s I’m Not Dead entered the world, reminding us to stand proud and unbroken. Let that bold, unapologetic spirit be yours today. May your year ahead shine with the fierce light of someone who refuses to be anything less than fully alive, and may every step forward feel like the start of a defiant, beautiful song. Happy birthday.

04-01.birthdayZh: 4月1日，是你的生日。这一天世界曾诞生过许多音符，比如Andrew Hill的《Point of Departure》，像一次勇敢的启程，提醒你不必害怕出发；还有Al Green的《Greatest Hits》，那些温柔而笃定的旋律，唱出生命里最值得珍藏的光芒。你是所有起点与热爱的集合，像四月本身，带着破土的力量与柔软的希望。生日快乐，愿你始终拥有出发的勇气与拥抱自己的深情。
04-01.birthdayEn: April 1 is your birthday. A date of fresh starts and lyrical beginnings, just like the spirit of Andrew Hill’s Point of Departure, that jazz journey into new frontiers of sound. And like Al Green’s Greatest Hits, your life is a soulful collection of love, grace, and timeless moments. May this year unfold with the poetry of an unexpected melody, each day a verse of warmth and joy. You are a beautiful song still being written—happy, happy birthday.
